rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_OCCURRENCEID_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_OCCURRENCEID_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:occurrenceID Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_KINGDOM_FOUND in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_KINGDOM_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:kingdom Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:month interpretable as an integer between 1 and 12 inclusive?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_MONTH_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:month Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:geodeticDatum using the bdqval:sourceAuthority.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_GEODETICDATUM_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: Chapman and Wieczorek (2020) recommend best practice is to use EPSG codes (https://epsg.io/) as a controlled vocabulary. Ideally, amend to the EPSG code for the geographic coordinate reference system (CRS), if known. Otherwise use the EPSG code for the geodetic datum, if known. Otherwise use the EPSG code of the ellipsoid, if known. If none of these is known, use the explicit value "not recorded". The reference vocabularies of values for geodetic datums and ellipsoids needs to be made available and should map alternative representations of dwc:geodeticDatum strings to EPSG codes, such as "WGS84", "WGS_84", "WGS:84", "WGS 84", all with standard value "EPSG:4326". NB. Do NOT change one datum to any other datum no matter how close they are or may appear to be. The same treatment should be given to all datums, which is to use their transformation algorithms to get the equivalent in EPSG:4326. For reference, a vocabulary of synonyms for EPSG codes for values of dwc:geodeticDatum can be found at https://registry.gbif.org/vocabulary/GeodeticDatum/concepts and and for more information on obtaining the EPSG dataset, see https://docs.geotools.org/latest/userguide/library/referencing/epsg.html. For the purposes of this Test "not recorded" is not a value in the bdqval:sourceAuthority and should result in NOT_AMENDED.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:geodeticDatum Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:countryCode a valid ISO 3166-1-alpha-2 country code?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COUNTRYCODE_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: Locations outside of a jurisdiction covered by a country code may have a value in the field dwc:countryCode, the ISO user defined codes include XZ used by the UN for installations on the high seas and recommended in Darwin Core to designate the high seas. Also available in the ISO user defined codes is ZZ, used by Darwin Core and GBIF to mark unknown countries. This Test should accept both XZ and ZZ as COMPLIANT country codes. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:countryCode Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:minimumDepthInMeters within the Parameter range?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_MINDEPTH_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: The Challenger Deep in the Mariana Trench is the deepest known point in Earth's oceans at 10,994 meters below sea level. We have rounded up bdqval:maximumValidDepthInMeters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:minimumDepthInMeters In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:degreeOfEstablishment occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DEGREEOFESTABLISHMENT_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:degreeofEstablishment Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in any of the terms needed to determine that the taxon exists?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_TAXON_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: This tests for records that have no taxonomic (NAME) information. If there is any value for any of the Information Elements, this may be useful information. See example.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:Taxon Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_MINELEVATION_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_MINELEVATION_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:minimumElevationInMeters In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:basisOfRecord using the bdqval:sourceAuthority.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_BASISOFRECORD_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: The term dwc:basisOfRecord has the comment "Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary such as the set of local names of the identifiers for classes in Darwin Core." The list of these values can be determined by searching https://github.com/tdwg/dwc/blob/master/vocabulary/term_versions.csv for rows with status="recommended" and rdf_type="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Class". For example, the term http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/PreservedSpecimen has a local name PreservedSpecimen. For Tests against a dwc:Occurrence record, the set of valid terms is more limited and embodied in the resource found at https://rs.gbif.org/vocabulary/dwc/basis_of_record.xml, which contains the local name for the identifier, as well as preferred and alternate labels from which to standardize values.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:basisOfRecord Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:decimalLongitude a number between -180 and 180 inclusive?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DECIMALLONGITUDE_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:decimalLongitude In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:minimumElevationInMeters within the Parameter range?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_MINELEVATION_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: We have rounded up the Parameter values. We are aware of sub-ice elevations in Antarctica to -3,500m and possible sampling in the atmosphere above the elevation of the top of Mt Everest should fail this Test if captured as elevation rather than as distanceAboveSurfaceInMeters. Elevations below the maximum elevation yet above the local surface will be false positives.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:minimumElevationInMeters In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_OCCURRENCEID_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_OCCURRENCEID_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:occurrenceID Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:kingdom occur at the rank of Kingdom in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_KINGDOM_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: The purpose of this Test is to check whether the value is a name that is a result of a nomenclatural act at this rank. This excludes unpublished names, misspellings and vernacular names. It is expected that the Test will designate the source authority against which to check. The same Test might return distinct results when using distinct source authorities.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:kingdom Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:dataGeneralizations?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: ISSUE_DATAGENERALIZATIONS_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: This is not specific to spatial data, any value in the dwc:dataGeneralizations field will cause this flag to be raised, but the primary Use Case is expected to be that dwc:dataGeneralizations demonstrates obfuscated locations.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Issue dwc:dataGeneralizations Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the polynomial represented in dwc:scientificName consistent with the equivalent values in dwc:genericName, dwc:specificEpithet, dwc:infraspecificEpithet?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_POLYNOMIAL_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: If dwc:specificEpithet is populated then this Test expects that the value dwc:specificEpithet is the name of the second or species epithet of the scientificName. If dwc:genericName is populated, this Test expects that the value of dwc:genus is the first word of the value of dwc:scientificName. If dwc:specificEpithet is populated then this Test expects that the value dwc:specificEpithet is the name of the first or species epithet of the scientificName. If dwc:infraspecificEpithet is populated, then this Test expects that the value of dwc:infraspecificEpithet is the name of the lowest or terminal infraspecific epithet of the scientificName, excluding any rank designation.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation Polynomial Consistent for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Are the supplied geographic coordinates within a defined buffer of the center of the country?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: ISSUE_COORDINATES_CENTEROFCOUNTRY
rdf:Description.skos:note: We have increased the buffer to 5000 meters to cater for differences that may have arisen due to the difference in geodetic datums.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Issue Coordinates Center of Country for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_COUNTRYCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_COUNTRYCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:country dwc:countryCode Consistent for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the combination of higher classification taxonomic terms consistent using bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_CLASSIFICATION_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: A fail condition may arise either from the taxon terms being internally inconsistent (not all of the information can be true at the same time), or from the vocabulary being incapable of resolving the combination of classification values. Additional Tests could be devised against a taxonomic authority to report the distinct failure conditions. This Test specifically does not consider the content of dwc:higherClassification.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation Classification Consistent for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_OCCURRENCESTATUS_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:occurrenceStatus Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_TAXON_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_TAXON_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:Taxon Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:class occur at the rank of Class in bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_CLASS_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: The purpose of this Test is to check whether the value is a name that is a result of a nomenclatural act at this rank. This excludes unpublished names, misspellings and vernacular names. It is expected that the Test will designate the source authority against which to check. The same Test might return distinct results when using distinct source authorities.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:class Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment or amendments to the values of dwc:minimumElevationInMeters and dwc:maximumElevationInMeters if they can be interpreted from dwc:verbatimElevation.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_MINELEVATIONMAXELEVATION_FROM_VERBATIM
rdf:Description.skos:note: If the dwc:verbatimElevation as a single value rather than a range, the minimum and maximum values should be amended with the same value. When transforming units, the transformation should be reversible, not adjusting the number of significant digits or adjusting the rounding. For example, transform yards to meters by multiplying by 0.9144 and retaining added significant digits (verbatim elevation of 10 yards to minimum and maximum depths in meters of 9.144). Implementations should be capable of interpreting verbatim data in at least meters,yards, feet, and kilometers in the form of either a single value or a range. The units must be specified in the verbatim data to be interpretable.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:minimumElevationInMeters dwc:maximumElevationInMeters from dwc:verbatimElevation for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_COORDINATEUNCERTAINTY_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_COORDINATEUNCERTAINTY_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:month as an integer between 1 and 12 inclusive.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_MONTH_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: Implementations should translate unambiguously interpretable names and abbreviations of months to their integer month values 1-12. Implementations should translate interpretable Roman numerals in the range I-XII in dwc:month as integer month values 1-12, as some natural science domains use roman numeral months to avoid language and day/month vs month/day order concerns. In these cases, the result will be AMENDED numeric equivalents.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:month Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_OCCURRENCESTATUS_STANDARD in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_OCCURRENCESTATUS_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:occurrenceStatus Standard for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dcterms:license occur in bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_LICENSE_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: The license at the record level might be derived from the license of the dataset from which the record is retrieved. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters. The canonical form of the Creative Commons license IRI has nothing after the version (e.g., https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/), but may be followed by deed or legalcode e.g. https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed and this may be followed by a language code. However, only some two-letter language codes have translations, and some translations are identified by a longer string than the two-letter language code. Errors in the language code, or specifying a language code for which a translation doesn't exist returns a 404 error instead of redirecting to the more general license IRI. As of 2024-02-28 deed.mi doesn't exist yet, but legalcode.mi does.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dcterms:license Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:sex using the bdqval:sourceAuthority.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_SEX_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: For reference, a list of synonyms for dwc:sex values can be found at https://registry.gbif.org/vocabulary/Sex/concepts.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:sex Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_KINGDOM_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_KINGDOM_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:kingdom Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:family occur at the rank of Family in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_FAMILY_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: The purpose of this Test is to check whether the value is a name that is a result of a nomenclatural act at this rank. This excludes unpublished names, misspellings and vernacular names. It is expected that the Test will designate the source authority against which to check. The same Test might return distinct results when using distinct source authorities.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:family Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_NAMEPUBLISHEDINYEAR_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_NAMEPUBLISHEDINYEAR_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:namePublishedInYear Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:kingdom?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_KINGDOM_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:kingdom Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DAY_STANDARD in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DAY_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:day Standard for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dc:type?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DCTYPE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dc:type Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_COUNTRY_FOUND in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_COUNTRY_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:country Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:eventDate from values in dwc:year, dwc:month and dwc:day.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_EVENTDATE_FROM_YEARMONTHDAY
rdf:Description.skos:note: An attempt to populate dwc:eventDate from dwc:verbatimEventDate and from dwc:startDayOfYear and dwc:endDayOfYear should be made before this Test is run. If dwc:year and dwc:day are present and interpretable, but dwc:month is not supplied or is not interpretable, then just the year should be given as the proposed amendment. This Test assumes that that dwc:year, dwc:month, dwc:day are in a Gregorian calendar, and that only those three pieces of information are needed to produce a dwc:eventDate (explicitly in ISO 8601-1 format, and thus using the Gregorian calendar). When running the Test, the original precision, e.g. dwc:year=1980, dwc:month=1 should be retained, e.g. dwc:eventDate should become 1980-01, not 1980-01-01/1980-01-31.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:eventDate from dwc:year dwc:month dwc:day for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_COUNTRYCODE_STANDARD in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_COUNTRYCODE_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:countryCode Standard for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:dateIdentified to a valid ISO date.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_DATEIDENTIFIED_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: We reference Wikipedia for the ISO standard because the standard documents are not free.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:dateIdentified Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_LOCATION_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_LOCATION_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dcterms:Location Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_KINGDOM_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_KINGDOM_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:kingdom Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the values of dwc:decimalLatitude, dwc:decimalLongitude, and dwc:geodeticDatum from geographic coordinate information in the verbatim coordinates terms.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_COORDINATES_FROM_VERBATIM
rdf:Description.skos:note: Transformations between coordinate reference systems should not be made as a part of this Test. Though coordinate precision of the verbatim coordinates could also be interpreted during the process of amending decimal coordinates from verbatim coordinates, that amendment is recommended to be an independent Test. Note that dwc:verbatimLatitude, dwc:verbatimLongitude and dwc:verbatimCoordinates might all be populated, and they may or not be perfectly consistent with each other. An ideal implementation should check for the consistency of these three fields and not amend them if they are inconsistent.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment Coordinates from Verbatim for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DECIMALLATITUDE_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DECIMALLATITUDE_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:decimalLatitude In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:eventDate entirely with the Parameter range?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_EVENTDATE_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test provides for a default earliest date, which is 1582-11-15 by convention. That date was chosen because ISO 8601-1 asserts that "the use of proleptic Gregorian calendar dates prior are not allowed in ISO 8601-1 without prior agreement of the parties exchanging data", and Darwin Core does not comment on this. Different calendars have been used at different times in different places, and the transcription of an original date in one calendar into dwc:eventDate, where a Gregorian Calendar is assumed, may or may not have been done with the correct translation of the date, and metadata may or not be present to even identify such records. Given the complexity, and ongoing nature of transitions between calendars, we do not advocate using this Test for quality assurance by selecting a transition date and using it as a threshold.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:eventDate In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_MAXDEPTH_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_MAXDEPTH_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:maximumDepthInMeters In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:maximumDepthInMeters within the Parameter range?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_MAXDEPTH_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: The Challenger Deep in the Mariana Trench is the deepest known point in Earth's oceans at 10,994 meters below sea level. We have rounded up bdqval:maximumValidDepthInMeters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:maximumDepthInMeters In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a match of the contents of dwc:scientificName with the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAME_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: The purpose of this Test is to detect errors in the scientific name but is dependent on the abilities of the parsing of the bdqval:sourceAuthority. For research users of biodiversity data doing quality assurance, VALIDATION_TAXON_UNAMBIGUOUS (4c09f127-737b-4686-82a0-7c8e30841590) handles their needs, but for curators of datasets doing quality control, this Test provides a specific subset of targeted data cleaning, making it a valuable Test to include for the quality control case.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:scientificName Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_EVENTDATE_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_EVENTDATE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:eventDate Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:scientificNameID?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAMEID_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:scientificNameID Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in any of the terms dwc:eventDate, dwc:year, dwc:month, dwc:day, dwc:startDayOfYear, dwc:endDayOfYear, dwc:verbatimEventDate?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_EVENTTEMPORAL_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: Only fails if all of the relevant fields of the Darwin Core Event class are bdqval:Empty or do not exist. Relevant Darwin Core fields include dwc:eventDate, dwc:verbatimEventDate, dwc:year, dwc:month, dwc:day, dwc:startDayOfYear, dwc:endDayOfYear. The terms dwc:eventID (if populated may or may not point to temporal information accessible to the user of the data) and dwc:eventTime (which is rare) are not included.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:Event Temporal Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:basisOfRecord occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_BASISOFRECORD_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: The term dwc:basisOfRecord has the comment "Recommended best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary such as the set of local names of the identifiers for classes in Darwin Core." The list of these values can be determined by searching https://github.com/tdwg/dwc/blob/master/vocabulary/term_versions.csv for rows with status="recommended" and rdf_type="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Class". For Tests against a dwc:Occurrence record, the set of valid terms is more limited and embodied in the resource found at https://rs.gbif.org/vocabulary/dwc/basis_of_record.xml. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:basisOfRecord Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:scientificNameID if it can be unambiguously resolved from bdqval:sourceAuthority using the available taxon terms.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_SCIENTIFICNAMEID_FROM_TAXON
rdf:Description.skos:note: Return a result with no value and a Result.status of NOT_AMENDED with a Response.comment of ambiguous if the information provided does not resolve to a unique result (e.g. if homonyms exist and there is insufficient information in the provided data, for example using the lowest ranking taxa in conjunction with dwc:dwc:scientificNameAuthorship, to resolve them). When referencing a GBIF taxon by GBIF's identifier for that taxon, use the the pseudo-namespace "gbif:" and the form "gbif:{integer}" as the value for dwc:scientificNameID.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:scientificNameID from dwc:Taxon for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_MINELEVATION_LESSTHAN_MAXELEVATION in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_MINELEVATION_LESSTHAN_MAXELEVATION
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:minimumElevationInMeters less than dwcmaximumElevationInMeters for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: A count of the number of distinct VALIDATION Tests that have a Response.status="NOT_COMPLIANT" for a given record.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_NOTCOMPLIANT
rdf:Description.skos:note: We have three individual measures for pass (MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_COMPLIANT (45fb49eb-4a1b-4b49-876f-15d5034dfc73)), fail (MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_NOTCOMPLIANT (453844ae-9df4-439f-8e24-c52498eca84a)), and PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (49a94636-a562-4e6b-803c-665c80628a3d). To get the total number of Tests that were attempted, add all three measures. To get the total number of Tests that ran, add NOT_COMPLIANT (fail) and COMPLIANT (pass).
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measure Validation Tests Not Compliant for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measures the number of distinct VALIDATION Tests that have a Response.status="COMPLIANT" for a given record.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_COMPLIANT
rdf:Description.skos:note: We have three individual measures for pass (MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_COMPLIANT (45fb49eb-4a1b-4b49-876f-15d5034dfc73)), fail (MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_NOTCOMPLIANT (453844ae-9df4-439f-8e24-c52498eca84a)), and PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (49a94636-a562-4e6b-803c-665c80628a3d). To get the total number of Tests that were attempted, add all three measures. To get the total number of Tests that ran, add NOT_COMPLIANT (fail) and COMPLIANT (pass).
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measure Validation Tests Compliant for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_KINGDOM_FOUND in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_KINGDOM_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:kingdom Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_COORDINATESTERRESTRIALMARINE_CONSISTENT in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_COORDINATESTERRESTRIALMARINE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation Coordinates Terrestrial Marine for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_LICENSE_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_LICENSE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dcterms:license Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:day an integer between 1 and 31 inclusive?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DAY_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This is part of a group of similar Tests (VALIDATION_DAY_INRANGE (8d787cb5-73e2-4c39-9cd1-67c7361dc02e), VALIDATION_STARTDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE (85803c7e-2a5a-42e1-b8d3-299a44cafc46), VALIDATION_ENDDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE (9a39d88c-7eee-46df-b32a-c109f9f81fb8)).
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:day Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:typeStatus occur in bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_TYPESTATUS_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:typeStatus Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_GEODETICDATUM_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_GEODETICDATUM_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:geodeticDatum Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: The number of distinct VALIDATION Tests that have a Response.status="EXTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET" or "INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET" for a given record.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_PREREQUISITESNOTMET
rdf:Description.skos:note: We have three individual measures for pass (MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_COMPLIANT (45fb49eb-4a1b-4b49-876f-15d5034dfc73)), fail (MEASURE_VALIDATIONTESTS_NOTCOMPLIANT (453844ae-9df4-439f-8e24-c52498eca84a)), and PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (49a94636-a562-4e6b-803c-665c80628a3d). To get the total number of Tests that were attempted, add all three measures. To get the total number of Tests that ran, add NOT_COMPLIANT (fail) and COMPLIANT (pass).
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measure Validation Tests Prerequisites Not Met for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_DATEIDENTIFIED_STANDARD in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_DATEIDENTIFIED_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:dateIdentified Standard for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_MINDEPTH_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_MINDEPTH_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:minimumDepthInMeters In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:scientificNameAuthorship?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAMEAUTHORSHIP_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:scientificNameAuthorship Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Can the taxon be unambiguously resolved from bdqval:sourceAuthority using the available taxon terms?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_TAXON_UNAMBIGUOUS
rdf:Description.skos:note: There are any number of potential controlled vocabularies that might be used for this Test, including local vocabularies and taxon specific vocabularies. If dwc:scientificNameID is bdqval:Empty, use dwc:scientificName and dwc:CultivarEpithet to search for a unique taxon. If dwc:scientificName is bdqval:Empty, check with the terms that form atomic parts of it (dwc:genericName, dwc:specificEpithet, dwc:infraspecificEpithet, dwc:taxonRank, dwc:scientificNameAuthorship), and if more than one match is found, use the remaining terms to try to disambiguate to a single Taxon record. The terms dwc:subgenus, dwc:genus, dwc:family, dwc:order, dwc:class, dwc:phylum, dwc:kingdom, dwc:higherClassification, dwc:scientificNameID,, dwc:acceptedNameUsageID, dwc:originalNameUsageID, dwc:taxonConceptID should not be used to make a match if dwc:scientificNameID and dwc:scientificName or dwc:genericName, dwc:specificEpithet, dwc:infraspecificEpithet, dwc:taxonRank, dwc:scientificNameAuthorship are bdqval:Empty. Note that Test VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAME_FOUND (4c09f127-737b-4686-82a0-7c8e30841590) is a more specific Test for a subset of Information Elements from this Test.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:Taxon Unambiguous for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAMEID_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_SCIENTIFICNAMEID_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:scientificNameID Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DCTYPE_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DCTYPE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dc:type Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:stateProvince occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_STATEPROVINCE_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: Multiple values in the dwc:stateProvince field (whether to signify on a border or in a list of possibilities) will fail this Test. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:stateProvince Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAME_FOUND in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_SCIENTIFICNAME_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:scientificName Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:establishmentMeans occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_ESTABLISHMENTMEANS_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:establishmentMeans Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:eventDate a valid ISO date?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_EVENTDATE_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test should also pick up issues such as 29 Feb in a non-leap year.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:eventDate Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_LICENSE_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_LICENSE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dcterms:license Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:pathway occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_PATHWAY_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:pathway Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_TAXON_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_TAXON_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:Taxon Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Are the values in dwc:eventDate consistent with the values in dwc:year, dwc:month, dwc:day, dwc:startDayOfYear and dwc:endDayOfYear?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_EVENT_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test does not take a position on whether the value in dwc:eventDate, or the values in the atomic terms are correct, it simply points out the presence of inconsistencies. For this Test, dwc:eventTime is explicitly ignored. It may be useful to consider an additional Test that does evaluate dwc:eventTime and dwc:eventDate. In that case, but not in this Test, if the time is present in both dwc:eventDate and dwc:eventTime, and it is inconsistent, it may indicate an error in the dwc:eventDate, thus making it a problem that someone needs to evaluate. This Test will only assert consistency if the data are both internally consistent and are compliant with the term definitions, for example dwc:day, by its definition, can only be the day of an dwc:eventDate that has a precision of a day or better and is not a range that spans more than a single day. A dwc:day that was internally consistent with the first day of the year (that is, 1) of an dwc:eventDate that only had precision to a year would be consistent internally, but not consistent with the Darwin Core term definitions, and would not return COMPLIANT from this Test.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:Event Consistent for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DATEIDENTIFIED_STANDARD in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DATEIDENTIFIED_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:dateIdentified Standard for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: What is the duration of dwc:eventDate in seconds?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MEASURE_EVENTDATE_DURATIONINSECONDS
rdf:Description.skos:note: The duration of a day is 86400 seconds. Implementations should treat all days as 86400 seconds, but should include leap days (but not leap seconds) in durations that encompass them. Consumers should treat assertions about event date duration as approximations, see: https://xkcd.com/2867/
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measure dwc:eventDate Duration in Seconds for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_COUNTRYCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_COUNTRYCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:country dwc:countryCode Consistent for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in any of the Darwin Core spatial terms that could specify a location?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_LOCATION_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: Only fails if all of the relevant fields of the Darwin Core Location class are EMPTY or do not exist. Relevant Darwin Core fields include dwc:locationID, dwc:higherGeographyID, dwc:higherGeography, dwc:continent, dwc:waterBody, dwc:islandGroup, dwc:island, dwc:country, dwc:countryCode, dwc:stateProvince, dwc:county, dwc:municipality, dwc:locality, dwc:verbatimLocality, dwc:decimalLatitude, dwc:decimalLongitude, dwc:verbatimCoordinates, dwc:verbatimLatitude, dwc:verbatimLongitude, dwc:footprintWKT. Elevation and/or depth alone are deemed insufficient to meaningfully locate a position on the earth.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dcterms:Location Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_STATEPROVINCE_FOUND in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_STATEPROVINCE_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:stateProvince Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_TAXONRANK_STANDARD in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_TAXONRANK_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:taxonRank Standard for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DATEIDENTIFIED_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DATEIDENTIFIED_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:dateIdentified In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_GEODETICDATUM_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_GEODETICDATUM_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:geodeticDatum Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_PHYLUM_FOUND in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_PHYLUM_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:phylum Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:dateIdentified a valid ISO date?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DATEIDENTIFIED_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:dateIdentified Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_YEAR_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_YEAR_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:year Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_COUNTRY_NOTEMPTY in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_COUNTRY_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:country Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:country occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COUNTRY_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: Non-country information such as "high seas" will fail this Test (high seas should use dwc:countryCode = "XZ" and have dwc:country empty). Getty Place Types for administrative level "nation" are 81010 nation, 81011 independent sovereign nation, and 81012 independent nation. Multiple values in the dwc:country field (whether to signify on a border or in a list of possibilities) will fail this Test. Locations outside of a jurisdiction covered by a country code should not have a value in the field dwc:countryCode. This Test should find any matches at the Getty "nation" level including internationalized names and historical representations of that nation (where boundaries are same). This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:country Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_MAXELEVATION_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_MAXELEVATION_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:maximumElevationInMeters In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:country?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COUNTRY_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: Country is expected to be either bdqval:Empty or, ideally, have a value of "High seas" or an agreed equivalent if material comes from the high seas, or from those portions of Antarctica outside of any sovereign nation.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:country Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:eventDate from the content of dwc:verbatimEventDate.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_EVENTDATE_FROM_VERBATIM
rdf:Description.skos:note: If the proposed eventDate is prior to 1918-02-14, the Response.comment will include a note that the "verbatimDate was assumed to be in the Gregorian calendar". When running the Test, the original precision, e.g. year=1980, month=1 should be retained, e.g. dwc:eventDate should become 1980-01, not 1980-01-01/1980-01-31.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:eventDate from dwc:verbatimEventDate for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAMEAUTHORSHIP_NOTEMPTY in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_SCIENTIFICNAMEAUTHORSHIP_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:scientificNameAuthorship Not Empty for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:scientificNameID contain a complete identifier?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAMEID_COMPLETE
rdf:Description.skos:note: If any single bdqval:sourceAuthority such as GBIF is used, a valid and complete dwc:scientificNameID based on an alternative source authority is unlikely to provide a valid match. A text or number string as a namespace indicator without a URI will be ambiguous. As an example, GBIF's backbone taxonomy dataset can be found at https://doi.org/10.15468/39omei. When referencing a GBIF taxon by GBIF's identifier for that taxon, use the the pseudo-namespace "gbif:" and the form "gbif:{integer}" as the value for dwc:scientificNameID. Note that GBIF currently uses "TaxonID" for this entity. The terms NID, NSS, and URN are all Uniform Resource Identifiers - see the Wikipedia (2024) reference.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:scientificNameID Complete for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DECIMALLONGITUDE_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DECIMALLONGITUDE_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:decimalLongitude In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to values in any of dwc:year, dwc:month, dwc:day, dwc:startDayOfYear or dwc:endDayOfYear from the content of dwc:eventDate.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_EVENT_FROM_EVENTDATE
rdf:Description.skos:note: Only fields that are empty will be have changes proposed, and only if dwc:eventDate has a valid ISO 8601-1 date. The dwc:eventDate is the canonical form of the event date (it is the first trusted form). If event date does not contain a range,dwc:startDayOfYear = dwc:endDayOfYear. Time (as compared to date) is not deemed a CORE component. Note, see sequencing Tests section of standards documents, run this amendment after any other amendment that may affect dwc:eventDate
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:Event from dwc:eventDate for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment of the value of dwc:eventDate to a valid ISO date.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_EVENTDATE_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: The intent of the amended range is to capture the original uncertainty where possible. As in the example, we amend "1999-11" instead of "1999-11-01/1999-11-31". An AMBIGUOUS response is possible.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:eventDate Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_CLASS_FOUND in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_CLASS_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:class Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to fill in dwc:geodeticDatum using a parameterized value if the dwc:geodeticDatum is empty.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_GEODETICDATUM_ASSUMEDDEFAULT
rdf:Description.skos:note: The value of dwc:geodeticDatum applies to dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude, thus EPSG:4326 (https://epsg.org/crs_4326/WGS-84.html) is the appropriate EPSG code as it applies to the WGS84 datum used with a geographic coordinate system. If the dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters is bdqval:Empty, not interpretable, or not valid, this amendment should not provide a dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters. If the dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters is bdqval:NotEmpty and is valid, this amendment should add to the dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters the uncertainty contributed by the maximum datum shift at the given coordinates. Since different systems have differing requirements for what the default datum should be, it is left unspecified, but should match whatever the target datum is in AMENDMENT_COORDINATES_CONVERTED (620749b9-7d9c-4890-97d2-be3d1cde6da8). After the amendment is performed, the dwc:geodeticDatum field should be the assumed default datum as parameterized. An example implementation to determine the uncertainty added by asserting a default datum (datum shift) where a known datum is not declared can be found in [datumshiftproj.py](https://github.com/VertNet/georefcalculator/blob/master/source/python/datumshiftproj.py) in the source code for the [Georeferencing Calculator](https://georeferencing.org/calculator/) (Wieczorek & Wieczorek 2021). Included in the source code is a [5-degree grid](https://github.com/VertNet/georefcalculator/blob/master/datumerrordata.js) of datum shifts from an unknown datum to WGS84.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:geodeticDatum Assumed Default for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:degreeOfEstablishment using the bdqval:sourceAuthority.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_DEGREEOFESTABLISHMENT_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: For reference, synonyms for values of dwc:degreeOfEstablishment can be found at https://registry.gbif.org/vocabulary/DegreeOfEstablishment/concepts.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:degreeOfEstablishment Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_STARTDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_STARTDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:startDayOfYear In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_ORDER_FOUND in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_ORDER_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:order Found for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_ENDDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_ENDDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:endDayOfYear In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_DAY_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_DAY_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:day In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_TAXON_UNAMBIGUOUS in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_TAXON_UNAMBIGUOUS
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:Taxon Unambiguous for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_COORDINATESSTATEPROVINCE_CONSISTENT in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_COORDINATESSTATEPROVINCE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation Coordinates dwc:stateProvince Consistent for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:occurrenceStatus occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_OCCURRENCESTATUS_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: The recommended controlled vocabulary for this term consists of "present" and "absent", which are the only two appropriate terms for a Darwin Core Occurrence. This is reflected in the dwc:occurrenceStatus vocabulary for this Test. There is currently a mismatch between the (authoritative) lower case values at https://dwc.tdwg.org/terms/#dwc:occurrenceStatus and the vocabulary at GBIF (https://api.gbif.org/v1/vocabularies/OccurrenceStatus/concepts), which capitalized the first character. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there are case differences, leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:occurrenceStatus Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:taxonRank occur in the bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_TAXONRANK_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:taxonRank Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:scientificName?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_SCIENTIFICNAME_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:scientificName Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_MAXELEVATION_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_MAXELEVATION_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:maximumElevationInMeters In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:decimalLatitude?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DECIMALLATITUDE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:decimalLatitude Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_POLYNOMIAL_CONSISTENT in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_POLYNOMIAL_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation Polynomial Consistent for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:geodeticDatum occur as a valid geographic CRS, geodetic Datum or ellipsoid in bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_GEODETICDATUM_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: Darwin Core recommends best practice is to use a controlled vocabulary. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters. Chapman and Wieczorek (2020) recommend best practice is to use EPSG geographic CRS or Datum codes (https://epsg.io/) as a controlled vocabulary. Ideally, amend to the EPSG code for the geographic coordinate reference system (CRS), if known. Otherwise use the EPSG code for the geodetic datum, if known. Otherwise use the EPSG code of the ellipsoid, if known. If none of these is known, use the explicit value "not recorded". While "not recorded" is not a valid EPSG code, it is a valid value according to Darwin Core. The reference vocabularies of values for geodetic datums and ellipsoids needs to be made available and should map alternative representations of dwc:geodeticDatum strings to EPSG codes, such as "WGS84", "WGS_84", "WGS:84", "WGS 84" all with standard value "EPSG:4326".
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:geodeticDatum Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:order occur at the rank of Order in bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_ORDER_FOUND
rdf:Description.skos:note: The purpose of this Test is to check whether the value is a name that is a result of a nomenclatural act at this rank. This excludes unpublished names, misspellings and vernacular names. It is expected that the Test will designate the source authority against which to check. The same Test might return distinct results when using distinct source authorities.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:order Found for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is there a value in dwc:countryCode?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COUNTRYCODE_NOTEMPTY
rdf:Description.skos:note: Darwin Core recommends that data from the high seas (outside national jurisdictions) use dwc:countryCode = "XZ".
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:countryCode Not Empty for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:startDayOfYear an integer between 1 and 365 inclusive, or 366 if a leap year?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_STARTDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: See Test VALIDATION_DAY_INRANGE (8d787cb5-73e2-4c39-9cd1-67c7361dc02e). This Test only asks if dwc:startDayOfYear is a valid value for the relevant year, not if it is consistent with the start day of the range specified in dwc:eventDate. In a non-leap year, the valid range is 1-365 inclusive, in a leap year 366 is also valid. This Test should be run after the series of Tests that assure that dwc:eventDate is populated, if possible (i.e., AMENDMENT_EVENTDATE_FROM_VERBATIM (6d0a0c10-5e4a-4759-b448-88932f399812), AMENDMENT_EVENTDATE_STANDARDIZED (718dfc3c-cb52-4fca-b8e2-0e722f375da7), and AMENDMENT_EVENT_DATE_FROM_YEARMONTHDAY (3892f432-ddd0-4a0a-b713-f2e2ecbd879d)).
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:startDayOfYear In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_DAY_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_DAY_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:day In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_COORDINATESCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT in a record set are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_QA_COORDINATESCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation Coordinates dwc:countryCode Consistent for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the value of dwc:sex occur in bdqval:sourceAuthority?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_SEX_STANDARD
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters. For reference, a list of synonyms for dwc:sex values can be found at https://registry.gbif.org/vocabulary/Sex/concepts.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:sex Standard for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_COUNTRYSTATEPROVINCE_UNAMBIGUOUS in a record set that are COMPLIANT.

rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Measure if all VALIDATION_STARTDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE in a record set are COMPLIANT or INTERNAL_PREREQUISITES_NOT_MET (indicating some empty value).

rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Assurance, filter record set until this measure is COMPLETE.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord for QualityAssurance of Validation dwc:startDayOfYear In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:countryCode if dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude fall within a boundary from the bdqval:countryShapes that is attributable to a single valid ISO 3166-1-alpha-2 country code.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_COUNTRYCODE_FROM_COORDINATES
rdf:Description.skos:note: This amendment simply fills dwc:countryCode from a lookup of dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude. If the coordinate falls in the high seas outside any national jurisdiction dwc:countryCode="XZ" should be asserted. Values in dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters and dwc:coordinatePrecision (if present) imply a buffer around the provided coordinates. Likewise, country polygons cannot be 100% accurate at all scales (Dooley 2005), so a spatial buffer of the country boundaries is also justified. Taking spatial buffers into account does, however, greatly complicate the logic and the implementation of this and related Tests. In this Test, a detection of multiple country codes by sampling within the buffer, while possible, is not considered.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:countryCode from Coordinates for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:day interpretable as a valid integer between 1 and 28 inclusive, or is it validly 29, 30 or 31 given the dwc:month and dwc:year?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DAY_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: This Test must take into account the given month and year, if present, to account for leap years. This is part of a group of similar Tests (VALIDATION_DAY_INRANGE (8d787cb5-73e2-4c39-9cd1-67c7361dc02e, #VALIDATION_STARTDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE (85803c7e-2a5a-42e1-b8d3-299a44cafc46), VALIDATION_ENDDAYOFYEAR_INRANGE9a39d88c-7eee-46df-b32a-c109f9f81fb8)).
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:day In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:year within the Parameter range?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_YEAR_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: The results of this Test are time-dependent. Next year is not valid now. Next year it will be. This Test provides the option to designate lower and upper limits to the year. The upper limit, if not provided, should default to the year when the Test is run. This Test provides for a default earliest date (year), of 1582 by convention. That value was chosen because ISO 8601-1 asserts that "the use of proleptic Gregorian calendar dates prior are not allowed in ISO 8601-1 without prior agreement of the parties exchanging data", and Darwin Core provides no such prior agreement.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:year In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Do the geographic coordinates fall on or within the boundaries of the territory given in dwc:countryCode or its Exclusive Economic Zone?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COORDINATESCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: dwc:coordinatePrecision and dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters (if present) imply a potential displacement of the provided coordinates. These two terms can be considered spatial buffers. Likewise, country polygons cannot be 100% accurate at all scales (Dooley 2005), so a spatial buffer of the country boundaries is justified. When dwc:countryCode=XZ (for High Seas), the coordinate should fall into a marine region out side of the EEZ of any country. Taking the spatial buffers into account does however greatly complicate both the logic and the implementation of such Tests. The same applies to potential conversion of the Spatial Reference System (SRS) of dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude to the SRS used in the bdqval:sourceAuthority.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation Coordinates dwc:countryCode Consistent for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_YEAR_INRANGE in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_YEAR_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:year In Range for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:day as an integer between 1 and 31 inclusive.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_DAY_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: If dwc:day contains text that may be interpreted as Roman numerals, the result will be NOT_AMENDED as this is not standard. Values such as "3rd" or "12th" can be interpreted as the integers "3" and "12". Text such as "5th Friday" is ambiguous.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:day Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Count the number of VALIDATION_MINDEPTH_LESSTHAN_MAXDEPTH in a record set that are COMPLIANT.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: MULTIRECORD_MEASURE_COUNT_COMPLIANT_MINDEPTH_LESSTHAN_MAXDEPTH
rdf:Description.skos:note: For Quality Control, compare the Response.result of this measure with the total number of records to assess work needed on the record set.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Measurement over MultiRecord Counting Compliance of Validation dwc:minimumDepthInMeters less than dwc:maximumDepthInMeters for MultiRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the ISO country code, determined from the value of dwc:country, equal the value of dwc:countryCode?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COUNTRYCOUNTRYCODE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: The country code determination service should be able to match the name of a country in the original or any language in the source authority. When dwc:countryCode="XZ" to designate "high seas", dwc:country should be empty. This Test must return NOT_COMPLIANT if there is leading or trailing whitespace or there are leading or trailing non-printing characters.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:country dwc:countryCode Consistent for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Proposes an amendment to the value of dwc:typeStatus using the bdqval:sourceAuthority.
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: AMENDMENT_TYPESTATUS_STANDARDIZED
rdf:Description.skos:note: Valuable for data quality needs related to voucher specimens in natural science collections. Almost all occurrence data will have no value in dwc:typeStatus. For reference, a vocabulary of synonyms can be found for dwc:typeStatus at [https://registry.gbif.org/vocabulary/TypeStatus/concepts].
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Amendment dwc:typeStatus Standardized for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Is the value of dwc:decimalLatitude a number between -90 and 90 inclusive?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_DECIMALLATITUDE_INRANGE
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation dwc:decimalLatitude In Range for SingleRecord

rdf:Description.dcterms:description: Does the marine/non-marine biome of a taxon from the bdqval:sourceAuthority match the biome at the location given by the coordinates?
rdf:Description.rdfs:label: VALIDATION_COORDINATESTERRESTRIALMARINE_CONSISTENT
rdf:Description.skos:note: dwc:coordinatePrecision and dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters (if present) imply a potential displacement of the provided coordinates. These two terms can be considered spatial buffers. Likewise, country polygons cannot be 100% accurate at all scales (Dooley 2005), so a spatial buffer of the country boundaries is justified. Taking the spatial buffers into account does however greatly complicate both the logic and the implementation of such Tests. The same applies to potential conversion of the Spatial Reference System (SRS) of dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude to the SRS used in the bdqval:sourceAuthority. Note that in the current implementation Tests treat "brackish" in WoRMS as both marine and terrestrial. Note that both bdqval:taxonIsMarine and bdqval:geospatialLand are bdqval:sourceAuthorities, but as they form two parameters, distinct names are used for them.
rdf:Description.skos:prefLabel: Validation Coordinates Terrestrial Marine for SingleRecord
